summary: Tested Post Delete and Edit bug fixes. All 4 requested features verified working: 1) Post Delete via three-dot menu shows confirmation modal, 2) Post Edit opens modal with all session fields populated, 3) Edit Save shows 'Post updated' toast, 4) Session date banner shows 'Session from [date]' with 'Conditions from this day' badge.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed (pre-existing from iteration_200)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Post Delete and Edit bug fixes verified working. Key fixes were: 1) Added localPost state to store post data when menu opens, 2) Added activePost = localPost || post to use stored data, 3) Changed menu items to close menu first then open sub-modals with 100ms setTimeout to avoid overlay stacking. All features working correctly.

features_verified.post_delete_via_menu: PASS - Delete option in three-dot menu opens confirmation modal
features_verified.post_delete_confirmation_modal: PASS - Shows 'Delete Post?' with warning icon, message 'This action cannot be undone. The post will be permanently deleted.', and Cancel/Delete buttons
features_verified.post_edit_via_menu: PASS - Edit option in menu opens EditPostModal
features_verified.edit_modal_fields_populated: PASS - All session fields populated: Caption, Location (Sebastian Inlet), Session Date (03/31/2026), Start Time (06:30 AM), End Time (09:00 AM), Wave Height (3.7 ft), Period (10 sec), Wave Dir (SE), Wind Speed (12.5 mph), Wind Dir (NE), Tide Status (Falling), Tide Height (1.8 ft)
features_verified.edit_save_functionality: PASS - Clicking 'Save Changes' shows 'Post updated' toast
features_verified.session_date_banner: PASS - Shows 'Session from Tue, Mar 31' banner
features_verified.conditions_from_this_day_badge: PASS - Shows 'Conditions from this day' badge

bugs_fixed_verification.localPost_state_fix: VERIFIED - Post data no longer becomes null after menu closes
bugs_fixed_verification.setTimeout_overlay_fix: VERIFIED - Dialog overlays no longer stack causing click interception

console_errors_noted: Failed to fetch bookings: AxiosError - 404 (not related to tested features, pre-existing)
